query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeClientSecret, 1, 10) as clientSecretStart,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeClientSecret, -10) as clientSecretEnd,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as clientSecretLen,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refreshTokenStart,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, -50) as refreshTokenEnd,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refreshTokenLen,
  tastytradeAccessTokenExpiresAt,
  updatedAt
FROM apiCredentials 
WHERE userId = 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeClientSecret, 1, 10) as clientSecretStart,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeClientSecret, -10) as clientSecretEnd,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as clientSecretLen,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refreshTokenStart,
  SUBSTRING(tastytradeRefreshToken, -50) as refreshTokenEnd,
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refreshTokenLen,
  tastytradeAccessTokenExpiresAt,
  updatedAt
FROM apiCredentials 
WHERE userId = 1;
